entries.original:
Travel is good for the soul.
Visiting new lands, meeting
new folks... Doesn't it sound
exciting? My path will lead
me here again some fair day.
Until then, have a good life!

entries.original:
I take leave of my life.
  My footsteps carry me
     like clouds upon wind,
   drifting in the pale light
     of the dawning day...
I go in search of adventure.

entries.original:
Listen, now, and hear the
wisdom I have to share!
Trees are life! Do not hew
them recklessly! Swing your
axe with wisdom, for the
benefit of all!

entries.original:
When I first came, there was
nothing. The emptiness
saddened me, and I bent my
will to planting flowers.
Is this village not better for
my efforts?

is neither too hard nor too
softーtrue joy lies in the
creamy middle. Now heed my
words: plant trees only in
sunshineーthey hate shadows.

darling! All the trees, those
cute houses...and the fish in
your riverーyummy! Maybe I
should move in...

sweet, lonely child of mine!

ancient ocean dweller. We
hereby return this specimen
to you and eagerly await
future submissions.

entries.original:
The fossil you recently sent
us is a dinosaur eggーif only
it could hatch! We hereby
return this fine specimen to
you, and eagerly await future
submissions. Happy hunting!
entries.new:

us is a dinosaur eggーif only
it could hatch! We hereby

us is a dinosaur track,
preserved in mud ages ago.
We hereby return this fine
specimen to you and eagerly
await future submissions.
entries.new:

us is a dinosaur track,

We hereby return this fine
specimen to you and eagerly
await future submissions.

us is amber, a durable resin
in which many fossils are
preserved. We hereby return
this specimen to you and
await future submissions.
entries.new:

us is amber, a durable resin

entries.original:
I was thinking of you the 
other day as I made some
coffee. And when I went to
take a sip of it, it was the
worst pot of coffee I've ever
made! Why would that be?
entries.new:
I was thinking of you the 
other day as I made some
coffee. And when I went to
take a sip of it, it was the
worst pot of coffee I've ever
made! Why would that be?

entries.original:
I got this on saleーyou know
how your mom loves to hunt
the wild bargain!
Anyway, it didn't look good
on me when I got home, so
I'll give it to you. Enjoy it!
entries.new:
I got this on saleーyou know
how your mom loves to hunt
the wild bargain!
Anyway, it didn't look good
on me when I got home, so
I'll give it to you. Enjoy it!

entries.original:
Well, I just got back from a
short trip. I love traveling
by train! Around every bend
of the track there are new
adventures, new people, and
new memories to be made...
entries.new:
Well, I just got back from a
short trip. I love traveling
by train! Around every bend
of the track there are new
adventures, new people, and
new memories to be made...

entries.original:
Our neighbor had a bunch
of these. I'm already way
too fullーI really overdid it! 
Why don't you have some?
The way you eat, I'm sure
you're just skin and bones!
entries.new:
Our neighbor had a bunch
of these. I'm already way
too fullーI really overdid it! 
Why don't you have some?
The way you eat, I'm sure
you're just skin and bones!

entries.original:
What shows up even if you
lock all your doors? Your
birthday! HAHAHA! Ohhh,
mercy! You should be happy
your mother has such a
good sense of humor!
entries.new:
What shows up even if you
lock all your doors? Your
birthday! HAHAHA! Ohhh,
mercy! You should be happy
your mother has such a
good sense of humor!

entries.original:
Horror of horrors! I found a
wrinkle today! Am I getting
old? Say...you don't get
uncomfortable hearing about
this sort of thing, do you?
entries.new:
Horror of horrors! I found a
wrinkle today! Am I getting
old? Say...you don't get
uncomfortable hearing about
this sort of thing, do you?

entries.original:
Would it kill you to visit
your folks once in a while?
We miss you! I think about
you often, and your dad...
Well, he misses you, too,
but you know how he is.
entries.new:
Would it kill you to visit
your folks once in a while?
We miss you! I think about
you often, and your dad...
Well, he misses you, too,
but you know how he is.

entries.original:
Try not to take this the
wrong way, hon, but...you've
always been a bit slow.
Which is fine! But that's
why you should always take
things at your own pace.
entries.new:
Try not to take this the
wrong way, hon, but...you've
always been a bit slow.
Which is fine! But that's
why you should always take
things at your own pace.

entries.original:
I saw this woman at the
store letting her horrid kids
run amok! One of the little
brats kicked me in the shin,
and before I knew it, I stuck
my tongue out at him!
entries.new:
I saw this woman at the
store letting her horrid kids
run amok! One of the little
brats kicked me in the shin,
and before I knew it, I stuck
my tongue out at him!

entries.original:
I found an old love letter
addressed to you while I
was cleaning out the attic.
I didn't READ it...but I may
have PEEKED. You know, to
make sure it wasn't a bill.
entries.new:
I found an old love letter
addressed to you while I
was cleaning out the attic.
I didn't READ it...but I may
have PEEKED. You know, to
make sure it wasn't a bill.

entries.original:
Being filled with doubt and
uncertainty is just part of
being young. Don't worry so
much, my dear! Even adults
live with doubt and regret;
all you can do is just live!
entries.new:
Being filled with doubt and
uncertainty is just part of
being young. Don't worry so
much, my dear! Even adults
live with doubt and regret;
all you can do is just live!

entries.original:
Well, just got back! We had
such a great time on our
first trip abroad. There was
one small hitch, though: I
woke up really late, and I
had to travel in my P.J.s!
entries.new:
Well, just got back! We had
such a great time on our
first trip abroad. There was
one small hitch, though: I
woke up really late, and I
had to travel in my P.J.s!

entries.original:
I found 10,000 Bells while
"cleaning" your dad's desk.
Looks like I've a date with
some fancy new shoes!
P.S. Here's your share.
This is our little secret!
entries.new:
I found 10,000 Bells while
"cleaning" your dad's desk.
Looks like I've a date with
some fancy new shoes!
P.S. Here's your share.
This is our little secret!

entries.original:
I was so excited to start
my new jazz dancing class...
until some big-haired ditz
in an ugly leotard told me
it looked like I was
square-dancing! The nerve!
entries.new:
I was so excited to start
my new jazz dancing class...
until some big-haired ditz
in an ugly leotard told me
it looked like I was
square-dancing! The nerve!

entries.original:
You've been through a lot,
and had a hard go of it
sometimes, but you've always
done your best. It's all you
CAN do! ...Just once, I wish
someone would tell me that.
entries.new:
You've been through a lot,
and had a hard go of it
sometimes, but you've always
done your best. It's all you
CAN do! ...Just once, I wish
someone would tell me that.

entries.original:
I hate to say it, but your
mom's been going a little
grey lately. There's a little
snow on the mountains! I'm
young at heart, though, so
I'm dying my hair purple!
entries.new:
I hate to say it, but your
mom's been going a little
grey lately. There's a little
snow on the mountains! I'm
young at heart, though, so
I'm dying my hair purple!

entries.original:
I found where your father
hides the credit cards, so I
did some shopping on one of
those 800 numbers. I went a
bit overboard: you can have
this, but promise to wear it!
entries.new:
I found where your father
hides the credit cards, so I
did some shopping on one of
those 800 numbers. I went a
bit overboard: you can have
this, but promise to wear it!

entries.original:
Ooh, is your mother a
financial whiz or what?
I made an absolute killing 
on the turnip market a
while ago, so I...well, I
turned your room into a spa!
entries.new:
Ooh, is your mother a
financial whiz or what?
I made an absolute killing 
on the turnip market a
while ago, so I...well, I
turned your room into a spa!

entries.original:
I found an old picture of
you and me the other day.
Oh, I looked so young!
You looked OKーyou were
smiling, I think, but WOW!
Your mom sure was a looker!
entries.new:
I found an old picture of
you and me the other day.
Oh, I looked so young!
You looked OKーyou were
smiling, I think, but WOW!
Your mom sure was a looker!

entries.original:
I found some of your old
comics and a box marked
"Precious Collectibles" when
I was tidying the house the
other day. I tossed them
out. You don't mind, do you?
entries.new:
I found some of your old
comics and a box marked
"Precious Collectibles" when
I was tidying the house the
other day. I tossed them
out. You don't mind, do you?

entries.original:
I decided I could stand to
lose a few pounds, so I
started doing aerobics. What
a fiasco... It's a long story,
but your dad ended up
calling the fire department.
entries.new:
I decided I could stand to
lose a few pounds, so I
started doing aerobics. What
a fiasco... It's a long story,
but your dad ended up
calling the fire department.

entries.original:
Remember the year you
fell out of the tree and
broke your poor arm? Mercy,
that tree produced so much
fruit that year! Doesn't
that strike you as odd?
entries.new:
Remember the year you
fell out of the tree and
broke your poor arm? Mercy,
that tree produced so much
fruit that year! Doesn't
that strike you as odd?

entries.original:
I was feeling bored, so I
started up a little kitchen
garden. Who knew I had
a green thumb? I grew more
fruit than I could eat!
entries.new:
I was feeling bored, so I
started up a little kitchen
garden. Who knew I had
a green thumb? I grew more
fruit than I could eat!

entries.original:
Your dad finally noticed the
exotic travel pamphlet I
"accidentally" left on the
table. Looks like it's time
for a little vacation! He's
convinced it was his idea.
entries.new:
Your dad finally noticed the
exotic travel pamphlet I

table. Looks like it's time
for a little vacation! He's
convinced it was his idea.

entries.original:
I recently decided to take up
gardening as a hobby, except
I couldn't grow anything but
brussels sprouts! I hate
those things! They're like
evil little cabbages. Bleah!
entries.new:
I recently decided to take up
gardening as a hobby, except

brussels sprouts! I hate
those things! They're like
evil little cabbages. Bleah!

entries.original:
I was watching a scary
movie the other nightーyour
father was fast asleep, of
courseーand I yelled at the
top of my lungs! Every light
on our street went on!
entries.new:
I was watching a scary
movie the other nightーyour
father was fast asleep, of
courseーand I yelled at the
top of my lungs! Every light
on our street went on!

entries.original:
I tried to move this
painting yesterday, but,
instead, it moved me!
True story!
entries.new:
I tried to move this
painting yesterday, but,
instead, it moved me!
True story!

entries.original:
My secret recipe for double
choco-caramel cake is
getting rave reviews all
over the neighborhood.
I should start a business!
I'd make a fortune!
entries.new:
My secret recipe for double
choco-caramel cake is
getting rave reviews all
over the neighborhood.
I should start a business!
I'd make a fortune!

entries.original:
Being popular is no great
feat. Anyone can do it! The
key is to be a personally
personable person. Nobody
likes a Gloomy Gus or a
Salty Sally!
entries.new:
Being popular is no great
feat. Anyone can do it! The
key is to be a personally
personable person. Nobody
likes a Gloomy Gus or a
Salty Sally!

entries.original:
We just got a new
convenience store in town.
Strangely, our village doesn't
FEEL any more convenient...
entries.new:
We just got a new
convenience store in town.
Strangely, our village doesn't
FEEL any more convenient...

entries.original:
It's the weirdest thing...
I found this spoiled carton
of milk in the fridge...and
for some reason I thought
of you. Anyway, when did
you last do your laundry?
entries.new:
It's the weirdest thing...
I found this spoiled carton
of milk in the fridge...and
for some reason I thought
of you. Anyway, when did
you last do your laundry?

entries.original:
Guess what! I've started
making homemade spaghetti
from scratch! I'll send you
some when I improve at itー
your poor father couldn't eat
solids for a week last time!
entries.new:
Guess what! I've started
making homemade spaghetti
from scratch! I'll send you
some when I improve at itー
your poor father couldn't eat
solids for a week last time!

entries.original:
Your dad complimented my
curry, so as a surprise, I
made it every night for the
rest of the week! Instead of
being excited, he got really
grouchy. Men!
entries.new:
Your dad complimented my
curry, so as a surprise, I
made it every night for the
rest of the week! Instead of
being excited, he got really
grouchy. Men!

entries.original:
If there's one meal your dad
loves, it's pork chops. Of
course, I only buy them on
sale, as they're pricey!
When shopping, use your
brains, not your belly.
entries.new:
If there's one meal your dad
loves, it's pork chops. Of

sale, as they're pricey!
When shopping, use your
brains, not your belly.

entries.original:
My dear, I miss you terribly
and sometimes wish you'd
move back home, but I know
it would be a bad idea...
For one thing, do you even
remember where we live?
entries.new:
My dear, I miss you terribly
and sometimes wish you'd
move back home, but I know
it would be a bad idea...
For one thing, do you even
remember where we live?

entries.original:
So, hon, you must be pretty
well settled over there by
now. I hope you're making a
point of being nice to your
neighbors! Nobody likes a
creepy next-door recluse!
entries.new:
So, hon, you must be pretty
well settled over there by
now. I hope you're making a
point of being nice to your
neighbors! Nobody likes a
creepy next-door recluse!

entries.original:
Your father and I made a
pleasant day of shopping
yesterday in the next town
over. I picked up your
favorite treat: Caramel-
Covered Goo Nummies!
entries.new:
Your father and I made a
pleasant day of shopping
yesterday in the next town
over. I picked up your
favorite treat: Caramel-
Covered Goo Nummies!

entries.original:
I chanced upon this in the
next town over and simply
couldn't resist buying it
for you. Just look at it!
It's perfect for you!
entries.new:
I chanced upon this in the
next town over and simply
couldn't resist buying it
for you. Just look at it!
It's perfect for you!

entries.original:
Take good care of this
sapling I grew for you, and
it will bring you fortune! I
don't know what'll happen if
you treat it like that tree
you didn't water. Misfortune?
entries.new:
Take good care of this
sapling I grew for you, and
it will bring you fortune! I
don't know what'll happen if
you treat it like that tree
you didn't water. Misfortune?

entries.original:
You're old enough now to
know this... When you were
a kid, I almost lost my cool
a number of times. Do you
recall "sledding" down the
stairs on the couch? I do...
entries.new:
You're old enough now to
know this... When you were
a kid, I almost lost my cool
a number of times. Do you
recall "sledding" down the
stairs on the couch? I do...

entries.original:
There was a darling bazaar
in the town square the other
day, and I happened upon
this adorable umbrella. Do
you want it? Don't stay out
in the rain too long!
entries.new:
There was a darling bazaar
in the town square the other
day, and I happened upon
this adorable umbrella. Do
you want it? Don't stay out
in the rain too long!

entries.original:
I found a muddy old pair
of your shoes and recalled
you when you were little,
stomping in mud puddles... 
I was so overcome by the
memory, I couldn't wash 'em.
entries.new:
I found a muddy old pair
of your shoes and recalled
you when you were little,
stomping in mud puddles... 
I was so overcome by the
memory, I couldn't wash 'em.

entries.original:
I asked your father, very
sweetly, "What would you
like for dinner, dear?"
No answer.
Well! It looks like someone's
getting meatloaf AGAIN!
entries.new:
I asked your father, very
sweetly, "What would you
like for dinner, dear?"
No answer.
Well! It looks like someone's
getting meatloaf AGAIN!

entries.original:
I was sort of dozing in
front of the TV, and someone
on the soap opera cried out,
"Mommm!" And I leaped up,
yelling, "What's wrong?"
I thought it was you! Ha!
entries.new:
I was sort of dozing in
front of the TV, and someone
on the soap opera cried out,
"Mommm!" And I leaped up,
yelling, "What's wrong?"
I thought it was you! Ha!

entries.original:
I don't really know why
I'm bothering to tell you
this, but we've been having
strictly leftovers for lunch
lately. Hope all's well!
entries.new:
I don't really know why
I'm bothering to tell you
this, but we've been having
strictly leftovers for lunch
lately. Hope all's well!

entries.original:
I heard a rumor about you
the other day. Is it true?
With the rubber cement,
and the spatula, and those
poor ants from little Timmy's
ant farm? My word!
entries.new:
I heard a rumor about you
the other day. Is it true?
With the rubber cement,
and the spatula, and those
poor ants from little Timmy's
ant farm? My word!

entries.original:
So, have you made any new
friends? I'd love to meet
them. What are they like?
Would I approve of them?
Are any of them hooligans? 
Was there anyone SPECIAL?
entries.new:
So, have you made any new
friends? I'd love to meet
them. What are they like?
Would I approve of them?
Are any of them hooligans? 
Was there anyone SPECIAL?

entries.original:
I tell you, sometimes, when
your father and I get too
stressed out, we just head
to a hot spring for some
time by ourselves. We come
back feeling like newlyweds!
entries.new:
I tell you, sometimes, when
your father and I get too
stressed out, we just head
to a hot spring for some
time by ourselves. We come
back feeling like newlyweds!

entries.original:
So, how do you like my
letters? They're funny, aren't
they? Especially for an old
bird like me! Whoo-HOOOO!
I am the wittiest mom
IN THE WORLD!!!
entries.new:
So, how do you like my
letters? They're funny, aren't
they? Especially for an old
bird like me! Whoo-HOOOO!
I am the wittiest mom
IN THE WORLD!!!

entries.original:
Strange... I've had a poor
appetite lately. How about
you? Have you been healthy?
Are you having melted cheese
sandwiches for dinner?
Are you washing your knees?
entries.new:
Strange... I've had a poor
appetite lately. How about
you? Have you been healthy?
Are you having melted cheese
sandwiches for dinner?
Are you washing your knees?

entries.original:
I went outside the other day
after a hard rain and guess
what I found buried?
A Gyroid! How weird
is that? Ah, the wonders
of nature!
entries.new:
I went outside the other day
after a hard rain and guess
what I found buried?
A Gyroid! How weird
is that? Ah, the wonders
of nature!

entries.original:
Always remember to use the
bathroom before you go to
sleep! Otherwise, you may
suffer a horrible fate, like
your poor Uncle Dweezil...
entries.new:
Always remember to use the
bathroom before you go to
sleep! Otherwise, you may
suffer a horrible fate, like
your poor Uncle Dweezil...

entries.original:
I certainly hope you're
remembering to brush your
teeth at night. I can't keep
you from living with beasts,
but I can at least remind
you to save your gums!
entries.new:
I certainly hope you're
remembering to brush your
teeth at night. I can't keep
you from living with beasts,
but I can at least remind
you to save your gums!

entries.original:
There's an old saying that
you can save three Bells by
waking up early, but me, I'd
pay ten just to be able to
sleep late... I do love my
beauty rest!
entries.new:
There's an old saying that
you can save three Bells by
waking up early, but me, I'd
pay ten just to be able to
sleep late... I do love my
beauty rest!

entries.original:
I hope you don't mind all
these strange letters, but
I just want to share my life
with you. Even if you have
chosen to live with animals,
which I'll never understand.
entries.new:
I hope you don't mind all
these strange letters, but
I just want to share my life
with you. Even if you have
chosen to live with animals,
which I'll never understand.

entries.original:
Stressful moments pass 
quickly from day to day,
but the combined weight of
all of them can crush your
youth... Never let your cares
weigh you down for long!
entries.new:
Stressful moments pass 
quickly from day to day,
but the combined weight of
all of them can crush your
youth... Never let your cares
weigh you down for long!

entries.original:
My New Year's resolution is
to help you be healthier and
happier. I'm still not sure
of the best way to go about
it, but I hope this helps!
entries.new:
My New Year's resolution is
to help you be healthier and
happier. I'm still not sure
of the best way to go about
it, but I hope this helps!

entries.original:
Happy New Year! Everyone
always shouts "Happy New
Year!" Not to be a "bum-
out," or whatever you kids
say, but what's so happy
about another year passing?
entries.new:
Happy New Year! Everyone
always shouts "Happy New
Year!" Not to be a "bum-
out," or whatever you kids
say, but what's so happy
about another year passing?

entries.original:
So did the groundhog see
its shadow today? Or not?
I saw your father's shadow.
It seems to grow wider
every year.
entries.new:
So did the groundhog see
its shadow today? Or not?
I saw your father's shadow.
It seems to grow wider
every year.

entries.original:
I say spring is coming,
regardless of what that
groundhog says. Just you
wait and see.
entries.new:
I say spring is coming,
regardless of what that
groundhog says. Just you
wait and see.

entries.original:
Down by the river's edge,
I sat on the ground and let
my cares flow away with the
cool water. And perhaps,
just perhaps, I heard the
soft footsteps of spring...
entries.new:
Down by the river's edge,
I sat on the ground and let
my cares flow away with the
cool water. And perhaps,
just perhaps, I heard the
soft footsteps of spring...

entries.original:
The early signs of spring
are all around. That means
its time to come out of
hibernation and get active
again. It's the season for
getting in shape.
entries.new:
The early signs of spring
are all around. That means
its time to come out of
hibernation and get active
again. It's the season for
getting in shape.

entries.original:
The cherry trees in the back
yard have positively exploded
into bloom recently! How do
they look in your neck of
the woods, my darling dear?
entries.new:
The cherry trees in the back
yard have positively exploded
into bloom recently! How do
they look in your neck of
the woods, my darling dear?

entries.original:
Looking at the cherry
blossoms, I remembered
the time you tried to climb
up to the highest branch!
Oh, how you tried! But you
never quite made it...
entries.new:
Looking at the cherry
blossoms, I remembered
the time you tried to climb
up to the highest branch!
Oh, how you tried! But you
never quite made it...

entries.original:
It's the darnedest thing!
I just noticed the marks we
drew on the wall to measure
your height as you grew up!
Oh, what memories! How tall
are you now?
entries.new:
It's the darnedest thing!
I just noticed the marks we
drew on the wall to measure
your height as you grew up!
Oh, what memories! How tall
are you now?

entries.original:
Spring is such a lovely
season. It makes me want
to go outside and fly a
kite. You should do the
same.
entries.new:
Spring is such a lovely
season. It makes me want
to go outside and fly a
kite. You should do the
same.

entries.original:
Ick. Another gray and cloudy
day... How depressing...
With my luck, the laundry
won't even dry on the 
clothesline. Well, hope your
day is nicer than mine...
entries.new:
Ick. Another gray and cloudy
day... How depressing...
With my luck, the laundry
won't even dry on the 
clothesline. Well, hope your
day is nicer than mine...

entries.original:
Oh, the heat last night was
unbearable! In the deep
darkness, I wandered down
to the river, enjoying the
night breezes... I must have
counted a thousand fireflies!
entries.new:
Oh, the heat last night was
unbearable! In the deep
darkness, I wandered down
to the river, enjoying the
night breezes... I must have
counted a thousand fireflies!

entries.original:
While out on a romantic
nighttime stroll, your father
and I walked through a huge
swarm of fireflies. I swear,
it was as if we were walking
through the Milky Way!
entries.new:
While out on a romantic
nighttime stroll, your father
and I walked through a huge
swarm of fireflies. I swear,
it was as if we were walking
through the Milky Way!

entries.original:
Nothing says summer like a
fireworks show. I took your
mother to the amusement
park a few days ago.
They had the best rockets
I've ever seen.
entries.new:
Nothing says summer like a
fireworks show. I took your
mother to the amusement
park a few days ago.
They had the best rockets
I've ever seen.

entries.original:
Dawn breaks... Slowly,
figures appear and gather
together...and then...
ONE! TWO! THREE! HUP!
Ugh.
I hate morning exercises...
entries.new:

this weekーanyone who's
anyone will be there! You'll
be pleased to know that your
mother will be looking smart
in her red dress this year...

entries.original:
I know it's September, but
it's still rather hot out,
don't you think? So take
care not to overheat!
And don't wear dirty socks!
You mind your mother, now!
entries.new:

entries.original:
It's strange... I heard this
noise for the longest time
before I realized it was
a bell cricket chirping! 
Boy, autumn sure snuck
up on me this year!
entries.new:
It's strange... I heard this
noise for the longest time
before I realized it was
a bell cricket chirping! 
Boy, autumn sure snuck
up on me this year!

entries.original:
Your father and I hiked up
the mountain to admire the
pretty fall leaves, but I
found myself enticed by
an aroma. Pretty soon, I was
hunting mushrooms like mad!
entries.new:
Your father and I hiked up
the mountain to admire the
pretty fall leaves, but I
found myself enticed by
an aroma. Pretty soon, I was
hunting mushrooms like mad!

entries.original:
Your mother and I just
joined the local mycological
society. We're learning all
about identifying and
picking mushrooms. It's
quite interesting.
entries.new:
Your mother and I just
joined the local mycological
society. We're learning all
about identifying and
picking mushrooms. It's
quite interesting.

entries.original:
Your father and I did some
yard work yesterday. He
raked up all the leaves, and
I set them on fireーyes, we
had a permit! It reminded
me of roasting chestnuts.
entries.new:
Your father and I did some
yard work yesterday. He
raked up all the leaves, and

had a permit! It reminded
me of roasting chestnuts.

entries.original:
Yesterday I was listening
to dead leaves rustle, and
all of a sudden a wave of
nostalgia crashed over me.
Fall is such a lovely time!
Lovely, yet sad...
entries.new:
Yesterday I was listening
to dead leaves rustle, and
all of a sudden a wave of
nostalgia crashed over me.
Fall is such a lovely time!
Lovely, yet sad...

entries.original:
I got so tired of writing
holiday cards that I must
have completely zoned out.
I wrote some upside down,
filled one with nonsense, and
addressed one to the cat.
entries.new:
I got so tired of writing
holiday cards that I must
have completely zoned out.
I wrote some upside down,
filled one with nonsense, and
addressed one to the cat.

entries.original:
The other day, I finally got
around to covering that fine
drawing you did on the
wallpaper during your 'young
artist' phase. Odd...I thought
your dad had the moustache.
entries.new:
The other day, I finally got
around to covering that fine
drawing you did on the
wallpaper during your 'young
artist' phase. Odd...I thought

entries.original:
I'm always joyous on
Mother's Day, regardless
of whether you give me
flowers or worms!

Just so you remember.
entries.new:
I'm always joyous on
Mother's Day, regardless
of whether you give me
flowers or worms!

Just so you remember.

entries.original:
You know, as a mother, I'll
never let go of my precious
memories of you. Like those
fabulous, fun-filled 46
hours I spent in labor... You
were worth every minute!
entries.new:
You know, as a mother, I'll
never let go of my precious
memories of you. Like those
fabulous, fun-filled 46
hours I spent in labor... You
were worth every minute!

entries.original:
Hey, child of mine! Isn't
this a wild foofaraw! Your
old dad's trying his hand at
this letter-writing thing!
Will wonders never cease?!
So, you know what today is?
entries.new:
Hey, child of mine! Isn't
this a wild foofaraw! Your
old dad's trying his hand at
this letter-writing thing!
Will wonders never cease?!
So, you know what today is?

entries.original:
Well, now, you'd have to
agree, I've been your dad for
quite a while, right? So I
was wondering... You don't
happen to remember exactly
when that began, do you?
entries.new:
Well, now, you'd have to
agree, I've been your dad for
quite a while, right? So I
was wondering... You don't
happen to remember exactly
when that began, do you?

entries.original:
Guess what!? I have great
news! We've decided to give
you your inheritance early!
You're rich!!!!
HA! April Fool's Day, dear!
No Bells for you!
entries.new:
Guess what!? I have great
news! We've decided to give

You're rich!!!!
HA! April Fool's Day, dear!
No Bells for you!

entries.original:
Ugh... No...more...letters...
I'm awfully sorry, dear, but
I've been writing letters all
day, and I am just bushed!
I promise to write a more
interesting one next time!
entries.new:
Ugh... No...more...letters...

entries.original:
Is there any more magical
time than the holidays?
I think not! Flurries drifting
through the frosty night air,
footsteps crunching through
snow, family gatherings...
entries.new:
Is there any more magical
time than the holidays?
I think not! Flurries drifting
through the frosty night air,
footsteps crunching through
snow, family gatherings...

entries.original:
I hope we make it through
the holidays without any of
last year's hoopla. That foul
eggnog still won't come out
of the drapes, and we never
did find Cindy's hamster...
entries.new:
I hope we make it through
the holidays without any of
last year's hoopla. That foul
eggnog still won't come out
of the drapes, and we never
did find Cindy's hamster...

entries.original:
Dearest child of mine!
On this day, the day of your
birth, your parents wish you
nothing but happiness!
Wish you were here!
entries.new:
Dearest child of mine!
On this day, the day of your
birth, your parents wish you
nothing but happiness!
Wish you were here!

entries.original:
Today is a special day,
the anniversary of the
day you came into our
lives! I tell you, that was
the happiest day in all
my days! Happy birthday!
entries.new:
Today is a special day,
the anniversary of the
day you came into our
lives! I tell you, that was
the happiest day in all
my days! Happy birthday!

entries.original:
My! The moon looks simply
beautiful in the autumn sky.
Sometimes I feel like I could
spend the rest of my life
gazing at the moon...
entries.new:
My! The moon looks simply
beautiful in the autumn sky.
Sometimes I feel like I could
spend the rest of my life
gazing at the moon...

entries.original:
I get so worked up worrying
about huge storms coming
that when they don't arrive,
I feel kind of disappointed.
Is that wrong?
entries.new:
I get so worked up worrying
about huge storms coming
that when they don't arrive,
I feel kind of disappointed.
Is that wrong?

entries.original:
I sure do love sauteed
mushrooms. But not as much
as your father! He ate so
many helpings last night,
I swear he started to look
like a mushroom himself!
entries.new:
I sure do love sauteed
mushrooms. But not as much
as your father! He ate so
many helpings last night,
I swear he started to look
like a mushroom himself!

entries.original:
You know when you eat
all the mushrooms out of
your mushroom pilaf, and all
that's left is brown rice? I
hate that! I need to improve
my mushroom-to-rice ratio!
entries.new:
You know when you eat
all the mushrooms out of
your mushroom pilaf, and all
that's left is brown rice? I
hate that! I need to improve
my mushroom-to-rice ratio!

entries.original:
Your father doesn't seem
to like having sardines for
dinner every night, but what
can I do?
entries.new:
Your father doesn't seem
to like having sardines for
dinner every night, but what
can I do?

entries.original:
I walked hand-in-hand with
your father down a gorgeous,
tree-lined street the other
day. The colors were lovely,
and he was just as handsome
as the day we met.
entries.new:
I walked hand-in-hand with
your father down a gorgeous,
tree-lined street the other
day. The colors were lovely,
and he was just as handsome
as the day we met.

entries.original:
Now that the snows have
melted, I can go for long
walks outdoors. It feels good
to stretch my legs after
being cooped up for so long!
entries.new:
Now that the snows have
melted, I can go for long
walks outdoors. It feels good
to stretch my legs after
being cooped up for so long!

entries.original:
I'm sure you'll face hardship
out thereーafter all, you're
out on your own with those
animalsーbut stick it out, no
matter what! You'll be fine,
I know it!
entries.new:
I'm sure you'll face hardship
out thereーafter all, you're
out on your own with those
animalsーbut stick it out, no
matter what! You'll be fine,
I know it!

entries.original:
The other day, I was rooting
around in a cupboard, and a
pair of cockroaches popped
out and skittered into a hole
in the wall! Ick!! I nearly
swallowed my cough drop!!
entries.new:
The other day, I was rooting
around in a cupboard, and a
pair of cockroaches popped
out and skittered into a hole
in the wall! Ick!! I nearly
swallowed my cough drop!!

entries.original:
I saw a swallowtail butterfly
basking in the sun yesterday.
My, it was gorgeous! It was
almost as if it was a gift to
me from Spring herself!
entries.new:
I saw a swallowtail butterfly
basking in the sun yesterday.
My, it was gorgeous! It was
almost as if it was a gift to
me from Spring herself!

entries.original:
When Old Man Winter relaxes
his icy grip and Dame
Spring blows warm breath
across my face, I sometimes
feel like a child being led
from one delight to another.
entries.new:
When Old Man Winter relaxes
his icy grip and Dame
Spring blows warm breath
across my face, I sometimes
feel like a child being led
from one delight to another.

entries.original:
The May weather must have
moved me to finish knitting
this sky-blue shirt for you!
Like the clear sky of spring,
let it breathe hope and 
fresh life into your soul!
entries.new:
The May weather must have
moved me to finish knitting
this sky-blue shirt for you!
Like the clear sky of spring,
let it breathe hope and 
fresh life into your soul!

entries.original:
I've started taking swimming
classes to get ready for the
summer heat. Apparently,
my best stroke is "the
flounder." They tell me I
invented it! Isn't that cool!
entries.new:
I've started taking swimming
classes to get ready for the
summer heat. Apparently,

flounder." They tell me I

entries.original:
I woke up in a great mood
today. Then, as I hung the
laundry on the line, the sky
clouded up, and it rained all
over my parade. Now I just
want to watch TV and sulk.

I went to sleep with the AC
set to "Glacial," but I
didn't even have a cold in
the morning! I did have to
wait for my eyelids to thaw,
but that wasn't a big deal.
entries.new:

entries.original:
Do you remember when we
planted the morning glories
in the front of the garden?
Well, one of them just
opened up and said "hello."
...Not literally, of course!
entries.new:
Do you remember when we
planted the morning glories

opened up and said "hello."
...Not literally, of course!

entries.original:
Your father paid me the
nicest compliment today!
He said, "You look so fine
in your bathing suit that I
can't bear to look at you!"
...Wait a minute.
entries.new:

It...is...so...hot...
Must...eat...ice...cream...
by...the...gallon...
entries.new:
It...is...so...hot...
Must...eat...ice...cream...

entries.original:
Ahh, summer! All I want to
do is eat watermelon, watch
fireworks, and collect
fascinating insects under
clear summer skies. And
a nap! On a picnic blanket!
entries.new:
Ahh, summer! All I want to

entries.original:
It's so hard to sleep in this
heat! But just when I think
I can't take it, I remember
the time you fell asleep on
the air conditioner and got
stuck. That was a hoot!
entries.new:

A poem for my dear child:
Roused from sleep
by chimes of wind,
I close the window
and climb back in.
...I love sleeping in.
entries.new:
A poem for my dear child:

entries.original:
I love visiting the blue,
blue sea, and lying by
the surf, and falling asleep,
and waking up utterly burnt
to a crispー
Wait, no...I hate that part.
entries.new:
I love visiting the blue,

Can you hear that?
Off in the distance...
The siren song of a wild
insect! Listen to its
barbaric yawp!
Let's go BUG HUNTING!
entries.new:

Blue Sea
Blue Sky
...Red nose!?
Sure enough, your mom
caught a cold this summer.

Blue Sea
Blue Sky
...Red nose!?
Sure enough, your mom

My! I just saw a weather
report for your area, and it
looks cold over there! You
remember to bundle up and
watch your health, OK?
Remember! An apple a day...
entries.new:
My! I just saw a weather
report for your area, and it

remember to bundle up and

Remember! An apple a day...

entries.original:
I was up all night knitting
a pair of gloves for you, but
it's the strangest thing...
I must have been 'in the
zone,' because before I knew
it, I'd made a sweater!
entries.new:
I was up all night knitting

If you get a cold, wrap your
throat in onion slices. And
if you have a fever, stick a
compress of minced garlic
under your armpits for an
hour. You mind your mother!

If you get a cold, wrap your

entries.original:
I made a snowman with your
dad for the first time in a
long while yesterday. It was
so much fun! When we were
done, it looked kind of like
you! Isn't that a hoot?

call me his hot potato.
Isn't that cute? But I swear,
on cold days, I'm no hot
potato! Instead, I magically
turn into a couch potato!

started cooking breakfast,
and I made you a huge meal
before I remembered that you
moved out! It's OK, though.
Your father ate it all.
